CustomField.label: Preprocessing Complete
CustomField.description: True when the large-deal preprocessing validation bit (position 0 of PreprocessingStatus) is Completed ('C'). Billing-agnostic: complete is CNNN (invoicing off) or CCCC (on). Used to gate the Prepare for Activation action.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Indicates the large-deal order has passed preprocessing validation and can be activated.
